notes: Page is JS-rendered (Angular SPA) and the public /api/v2/dishes/1441/restaurants endpoint returns 401 'Access Restricted' without the Cloudflare turnstile/auth cookie issued to the live page. WebFetch was denied in this environment, so the data was extracted by (1) fetching the static HTML for the JSON-LD QAPage block (yields 5 places: 1 acceptedAnswer + 4 suggestedAnswers, with detail-page URLs) and (2) using a Playwright browser to render the SPA, immediately killing setInterval/setTimeout to halt the marketing-style auto-rotation that kept replacing the URL with adjacent pizza varieties (new-york-style-pizza, chicago-pizza, pizza-al-taglio, etc.). The list view itself does NOT expose per-restaurant numeric scores — only an aggregate critic count ('Recommended by X and N other food critics'). The dish itself is rated 4.6/5. The 'LOAD MORE' button could not be exercised because the page kept being redirected by the SPA rotator before clicks landed; only the first 10 places (the default pre-LOAD-MORE set) were captured. Detail-page URLs are confirmed for ranks 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 from JSON-LD. URLs for ranks 6-10 are best-guess based on the consistent /Slug pattern observed for ranks 1-5 and are flagged url_inferred=true; do not trust these without verification. Addresses are street names only as displayed on the list (TasteAtlas does not show full numeric address on this view for most entries). Country is Italy for all 10 entries on the first page.
extraction_method: playwright DOM text after halting SPA rotation, cross-referenced with JSON-LD QAPage schema in static HTML
